Executive_Insights.insight: Jan–Apr 2026 vs Sep–Dec 2025: average price change -3.8%; volatility change 16.0%.
Theoretical daily spread change -10.0%; average daily revenue at 90% efficiency change -9.2%.
Frame the project as AI-assisted battery optimization and decision support, not only as a price forecast model.
Add Volue/Montel forecast columns to calculate MAE, RMSE, bias, Forecast≤Actual %, forecast-based PnL and capture rate.
